## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullet points: what changed and why. Reference the driving issue, canvas box, or PD milestone. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Keep the one that applies; delete the rest. -->

- feat — new functionality
- fix — bug fix
- refactor — behavior-preserving code change
- test — new or updated tests
- docs — documentation only
- chore — tooling / dependencies / meta
- ci — CI pipeline

## Test plan

<!-- How you verified the change. Include commands run and expected outcome. -->

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run coverage` does not regress below 100% stmts / 95% branches
- [ ] Manual check on a local Hardhat node (if a contract or script changed)
